entity.name: Ogulcan Aydogan
entity.description: Software engineer building open-source AI security and governance infrastructure. Based in the United Kingdom.

projects.name: Verifiable AI Output Ledger
projects.description: Cryptographic ledger for AI output verification using Merkle trees and digital signatures. Tracks, timestamps, and proves the authenticity of AI-generated content with tamper-evident audit trails.

projects.name: LLM Supply Chain Attestation
projects.description: Supply chain security for LLM artifacts using Sigstore, in-toto, and SLSA frameworks. Generates signed attestations for model weights, training data, and inference outputs.

projects.name: Prompt Injection Firewall
projects.description: Runtime firewall that detects and blocks prompt injection attacks against LLM applications. Covers OWASP LLM Top 10 attack vectors with configurable detection rules.

projects.name: Sovereign RAG Gateway
projects.description: Policy-first retrieval-augmented generation gateway with PHI/PII redaction, access control, and audit logging. Self-hostable with no mandatory cloud dependencies.

projects.name: AI Provenance Tracker
projects.description: Multi-modal AI content detection and C2PA provenance verification across text, images, audio, and video. Explainable confidence scoring with signal-by-signal breakdown.

projects.name: LLM SLO eBPF Toolkit
projects.description: Kubernetes-native observability tool using eBPF to capture kernel signals and correlate them with OpenTelemetry traces for LLM SLO attribution.

projects.name: AI Model Card Generator
projects.description: CLI pipeline that pulls model metadata from HuggingFace, W&B, and MLflow, runs fairness analysis, checks EU AI Act compliance, and exports model cards.

projects.name: MMSAFE-Bench
projects.description: Multi-modal safety evaluation benchmark for AI systems. Covers 20 hazard categories and 9 attack strategies aligned with MLCommons AI Safety standards.

projects.name: AI Regulation Compliance Scanner
projects.description: Rule-driven scanner that checks AI systems against EU AI Act, UK AI regulations, and NIST AI RMF requirements. Deterministic pass/warn/fail scoring.

projects.name: LLM Cost Guardian
projects.description: Transparent proxy for multi-provider LLM cost tracking, budgeting, and optimization. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, and Vertex AI with real-time cost headers.

plans.name: Monthly Supporter
plans.description: Monthly recurring support for ongoing maintenance and development

plans.name: One-Time Sponsor
plans.description: One-time contribution to support the project
